channel.title: Ev on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Ev on Pi Stack

item.title: TeslaMate vs EVCC vs OVMS: Best Self-Hosted EV Monitoring Tools 2026
item.description: Electric vehicle ownership generates rich telemetry data — battery state, charging sessions, drive efficiency, location history, and more. Most manufacturers offer proprietary apps, but these come with limitations: vendor lock-in, questionable data privacy, and closed ecosystems that prevent integration with your existing smart home or energy infrastructure.
